config.script:
#include "50203" #include "50202" #include "50101" #include "50122"
#include "50518" #include "50101"
dim g_strAdditinalScript 'dodatkowy skrypt dim g_strAdditinalFopenInstr 'dodatkowe instrukcje w fopen dim g_strAdditionalPageScript 'dodatkowy fragment strony dim g_pAdditionalCtrl 'tablica dodatkowych kontrolek dim g_strAdditionalWhereResults 'dodatkowa czesc where do wyswietlania wynikow "Pokaz" itd.
dim bTabs:bTabs = true function make_tabs(byval bMake ) bTabs = bMake end function
function setAdditionalScript(byval strNewScript) g_strAdditinalScript = strNewScript end function
function setAdditionalWhereResults(byval strNewAdditionalWhere) g_strAdditionalWhereResults = strNewAdditionalWhere end function
function addAdditionalFopenInstr(byval strNewFopenLine) g_strAdditinalFopenInstr = g_strAdditinalFopenInstr + strNewFopenLine end function
function setAdditionalFopenInstr(byval strNewFopenScript) g_strAdditinalFopenInstr = strNewFopenScript end function
function setAdditionalPageScript(byval strNewPageScr) g_strAdditionalPageScript = strNewPageScr end function
function setAdditionalCtrl(byref pCtrls) set g_pAdditionalCtrl = pCtrls end function
function fopen() #ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then fopen = false exit function end if #endif
g_strAdditinalScript = "" g_strAdditinalFopenInstr = "" g_strAdditionalWhereResults = "" g_strAdditionalPageScript = "" set g_pAdditionalCtrl = nothing set pfnOnPrepareRap = nothing
if not std_fopen() then fopen = false exit function end if
select case page_.root.cKind case "S" page_.topelement.title = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(page_.root.ResultTypeId).HumanName + _ " - Sposób wyszukiwania" case "R" page_.topelement.title = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(page_.root.ResultTypeId).HumanName + _ " - Raport" case "B" page_.topelement.title = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(page_.root.ResultTypeId).HumanName + _ " - Konfiguracja przeglądarki"
if not page_.cursoriter is nothing then page_.root.ignore=true std_flast() page_.cmdenabled CMD_NEWFORM, false end if case "F" page_.topelement.title = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(page_.root.ResultTypeId).HumanName + _ " - Konfiguracja wyszukiwarki"
if not page_.cursoriter is nothing then page_.root.ignore=true std_flast() page_.cmdenabled CMD_NEWFORM, false end if
end select
section_fopen THIS_FILE fopen = true end function
' show report function on_report() #ifdef _DEBUG dim pM60115 : set pM60115 = doc_.getmodule(60115) dim oNXRapDef : set oNXRapDef = pM60115.nx_load_raport_definition(page_.root) dim pSOTemp : set pSOTemp= doc_.createstreamobj() oNXRapDef.create_template nx_.apprep,0,pSOTEmp pSOTemp.save "c:\temp\nxraptemp.asp" #endif make_report page_.root.IdObj end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- function c11_ongetdata(ctrl,row) if page_.root.listFilter.exists(row) then dim oElem set oElem = page_.root.listFilter.get(row) if not oElem is nothing then ctrl.text = oElem.SearchTypeItem_compose_name() end if else ctrl.text = "" end if end function
function podpo_composepath(hli) dim row: row = clng(hli.prop(PROPC_ROW))
dim pPM: set pPM = doc_.getmodule(60113) dim strComposedPath
pPM.setShowSelfReference(true) pPM.setShowNameForWildReference(false)
pPM.SetPathBuilder doc_.afc.rap.new_path(page_.root.ResultTypeId) if pPM.select_object_field() = 0 then exit function end if strComposedPath = pPM.GetPathBuilder().root.serialize(1)
dim pSTOI if page_.root.listFilter.exists(row) then set pSTOI = page_.root.listFilter.get(row) else set pSTOI = page_.root.listFilter.addnew() end if pSTOI.ComposedPath = strComposedPath end function
function c1012_ongetdata(ctrl,row) if page_.root.listOrder.exists(row) then dim pRow set pRow = page_.root.listOrder.get(row) if not pRow is nothing then ctrl.text = pRow.SearchTypeItem_compose_name() end if else ctrl.text = "" end if end function
function podpo_composeorderpath(hli) dim row: row = clng(hli.prop(PROPC_ROW))
dim pPM: set pPM = doc_.getmodule(60113) dim strComposedPath pPM.setShowSelfReference(false) pPM.setShowNameForWildReference(false)
pPM.SetPathBuilder doc_.afc.rap.new_path(page_.root.ResultTypeId) if pPM.select_object_field() = 0 then exit function end if strComposedPath = pPM.GetPathBuilder().root.serialize(1)
dim pSTOI if page_.root.listOrder.exists(row) then set pSTOI = page_.root.listOrder.get(row) else set pSTOI = page_.root.listOrder.addnew() end if pSTOI.ComposedPath = strComposedPath end function
function c2012_ongetdata(ctrl,row) if page_.root.listColumn.exists(row) then dim pRow set pRow = page_.root.listColumn.get(row) if not pRow is nothing then ctrl.text = pRow.SearchTypeItem_compose_name() end if else ctrl.text = "" end if end function
function podpo_composecolpath(hli) dim row: row = clng(hli.prop(PROPC_ROW))
dim pPM: set pPM = doc_.getmodule(60113) dim strComposedPath pPM.setShowSelfReference(false) pPM.setShowNameForWildReference(true)
pPM.ShowList
pPM.SetPathBuilder doc_.afc.rap.new_path(page_.root.ResultTypeId) if pPM.select_object_field() = 0 then exit function end if strComposedPath = pPM.GetPathBuilder().root.serialize(1)
dim pSTOI if page_.root.listColumn.exists(row) then set pSTOI = page_.root.listColumn.get(row) else set pSTOI = page_.root.listColumn.addnew() end if
pSTOI.ComposedPath = strComposedPath end function
function c##CTRLID_ORDER_GROUP##_ongetdata(pCtrl,row): c##CTRLID_ORDER_GROUP##_ongetdata=true if page_.root.listOrder.exists(row) then dim pSTOI : set pSTOI = page_.root.listOrder.get(row) pCtrl.value = pSTOI.cGroup pCtrl.disable = false else pCtrl.disable = true pCtrl.value = "0" end if end function
function c##CTRLID_ORDER_GROUP##_ondataentered(ctrl, row, value) dim pSTOI if page_.root.listOrder.exists(row) then set pSTOI = page_.root.listOrder.get(row) else set pSTOI = page_.root.listOrder.AddNew() end if pSTOI.cGroup = value if value = "0" then pSTOI.cLink = "0" end if c##CTRLID_ORDER_GROUP##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRLID_ORDER_LINK##_ongetdata(pCtrl,row): c##CTRLID_ORDER_LINK##_ongetdata=true if page_.root.listOrder.exists(row) then dim pSTOI : set pSTOI = page_.root.listOrder.get(row) pCtrl.value = pSTOI.cLink pCtrl.disable = (pSTOI.cGroup <> "1") else pCtrl.disable = true pCtrl.value = "0" end if end function
function c##CTRLID_ORDER_LINK##_ondataentered(ctrl, row, value) dim pSTOI if page_.root.listOrder.exists(row) then set pSTOI = page_.root.listOrder.get(row) else set pSTOI = page_.root.listOrder.AddNew() end if pSTOI.cLink = value if value = "1" then pSTOI.cGroup = "1" end if c##CTRLID_ORDER_LINK##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRLID_SUMUJ##_ongetdata(pCtrl,row): c##CTRLID_SUMUJ##_ongetdata=true if page_.root.listColumn.exists(row) then dim pSTOI : set pSTOI = page_.root.listColumn.get(row) pCtrl.value = pSTOI.cGroup dim pPathCracker : set pPathCracker = doc_.afc.rap.new_path_cracker(pSTOI.ComposedPath) pCtrl.disable = (pPathCracker.RaportType <> RAPT_CURRENCY and pPathCracker.RaportType <> RAPT_QTY) else pCtrl.disable = true pCtrl.value = "0" end if end function
function c##CTRLID_SUMUJ##_ondataentered(ctrl, row, value) if page_.root.listColumn.exists(row) then page_.root.listColumn.get(row).cGroup = value else page_.root.listColumn.AddNew().cGroup = value end if c##CTRLID_SUMUJ##_ondataentered = true end function
'------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' Funkcja zwraca TypeId wskazywanego obiektu z composed path pochodzącego ' z obiektu SearchType ' '------------------------------------------------------------- function getLastTypeidFromSticp(szCompPath) if UBound(split(szCompPath,")"))>0 then getLastTypeidFromSticp = clng(0) else dim a: a = split(szCompPath,";") getLastTypeidFromSticp = clng(a(ubound(a)-1)) end if end function
function to2chars(nmb) :to2chars = CStr("00") if CLng(nmb)<10 then to2chars = "0"+CStr(nmb) else to2chars = CStr(nmb) end if end function
function setNotifyRaportObject(byref pfnOnPrepareRaport) set pfnOnPrepareRap = pfnOnPrepareRaport end function
dim pfnOnPrepareRap
' ' Funkcja wywołuje filtr do raportu i następnie generuje dla podanych kryteriów raport ' ' Parametry: ' [in] pSearchTypeObj - obiekt typu TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE określający raport ' function make_report(ByVal ST_IdObj) dim pSearchTypeObj : set pSearchTypeObj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE ,ST_IdObj) if pSearchTypeObj is nothing then exit function end if
' sprawdzamy, czy da się zapisać obiekt. Jeśli nie, to jest on niepoprawny - raportu nie będzie if not pSearchTypeObj.SearchType_BefInsUpd() then exit function end if
dim pRapDef: set pRapDef = trans_.afc.rap.new_rd(pSearchTypeObj.ResultTypeId) pRapDef.LoadSearchType pSearchTypeObj asp_raport_rapdef pRapDef end function
function on_choicelist() if not page_.root.SearchType_BefInsUpd() then exit function end if dim strChoiceListName if InputTextBox ("Nazwa listy wyboru","Podaj nazwę dla tworzonej listy wyboru", 0 ,strChoiceListName) = 0 then exit function end if dim pPM: set pPM = doc_.getmodule(60114) dim strButtons: strButtons = "Wypełnij liste" dim strColumns, strJoin, strWhere, strOrderBy, strGroupBy, strDescription, strIds
' pobierz kryteria wyszukiwania dim nRes: nRes = pPM.get_search_filter_result(page_.root, strButtons, strColumns, strJoin, strWhere, strOrderBy, strGroupBy, strDescription, strIds)
if nRes<>1 then exit function
dim ResTypeID:ResTypeID = page_.root.ResultTypeId
dim pTrans:set pTrans = trans_.createsubtran() trans_.var(APPVAR_CHOICELIST_TYPEID) = ResTypeID dim pChoiceList:set pChoiceList = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_CHOICELIST) pChoiceList.strNazwa = strChoiceListName dim pCursor,pElem,pCr : set pCursor = trans_.createrawcursor (ResTypeID, strWhere,strOrderBy, doc_.getmodule(60115).trim_first_join(strJoin) )
for each pCr in pCursor set pElem = pChoiceList.listElement.addnew() pElem.IdElement = pCr.IdObj next
if not trans_.saveobjects then MessageBox "Nie udało się zapisać listy." , "Lista wyboru", vbOKOnly, vbInformation else MessageBox "Zapisano listę wyboru." , "Lista wyboru", vbOKOnly, vbInformation end if
set pTrans = nothing end function
function c40_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c40_ongetdata = true oCtrl.value = cstr(page_.root.nIsSecurity) end function
function c40_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) page_.root.nIsSecurity = clng(newValue) c40_ondataentered = true end function
#include "50222"
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function

page.body:
#if appvarSearchKind = "R" || appvarSearchKind = "S"
#if appvarSearchKind = "S" Nazwa sposobu wyszukiwania #else #if appvarSearchKind = "R" Nazwa raportu #endif #endif
Nazwa
Ochrona
#endif
XFREQMULTILINEFIELD(34,Opis,4,Opis)
#if appvarSearchKind = "R" || appvarSearchKind = "S" || appvarSearchKind = "F"
listFilter
LP
#if appvarSearchKind = "F" Przeszukiwane pola #else Kryteria selekcji #endif
0
#endif #if appvarSearchKind <> "F"
listOrder
LP #if appvarSearchKind = "S" || appvarSearchKind = "B" Uporządkowanie #else #if appvarSearchKind = "R" Uporządkowanie Grupowanie Aktywne łącze #endif #endif #if appvarSearchKind = "R" || appvarSearchKind = "S" Malejąco #endif
0
#if appvarSearchKind = "S" || appvarSearchKind = "B"
#else #if appvarSearchKind = "R"
#endif #endif
#if appvarSearchKind = "R" || appvarSearchKind = "S"
cDesc
#endif
#endif
#if appvarSearchKind = "R" || appvarSearchKind = "B"
listColumn
LP
Kolumny
#if appvarSearchKind = "R" || appvarSearchKind = "B" Aktywne łącze #endif #if appvarSearchKind = "R" Sumuj #endif
0
#if appvarSearchKind = "R" || appvarSearchKind = "B"
cLink
#endif #if appvarSearchKind = "R"
#endif
#endif
#if appvarSearchKind = "R"
XF_BUTTON(varFunction = "on_report",Generuj raport) XF_BUTTON(varFunction = "on_choicelist",Zapisz jako lista wyboru)
#endif
